item.name: Terms
item.description: Indicates whether the terms of use are listed on login page

item.name: Login Message
item.default: Sign in to start your session
item.description: The message displayed to the users on the login screen

item.name: Use Local Authorization
item.description: Indicates whether the users will have their groups managed locally with the application

item.name: Client Domain
item.description: The domain to restrict client for Google

item.name: Tenant Id
item.description: The client identifier for Microsoft Azure

item.name: Client Id
item.description: The client secret for Microsoft Azure

item.name: Client Secret
item.description: The client secret for Microsoft Azure
